rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 9, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT BO WONG's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the first cause of action. This cause of action is bared by the statute of limitations. Plaintiff alleges in Complaint, paragraph 105 and Third Amended Complaint, paragraph 87 that he concluded that Defendants had not intention of sharing profits made through ownership of the real properties by the parties in 2007. This action was filed on August 8, 2012. = (501/REQ)

This cause of action is bared by the statute of limitations. Plaintiff alleges in Complaint, paragraph 105 and Third Amended Complaint, paragraph 87 that he concluded that Defendants had not intention of sharing profits made through ownership of the real properties by the parties in 2007. This action was filed on August 8, 2012. = (501/REQ)
